# SQLite WASM license notice

`sqlite3.mjs` and `sqlite3.wasm` are copied without modification from the official SQLite 3.53.3 WASM distribution.

The SQLite portions use SQLite's public-domain dedication and blessing. The Emscripten glue code uses the MIT and University of Illinois/NCSA open-source licenses. The complete notice is preserved at the beginning of `sqlite3.mjs`.

Source: <https://www.sqlite.org/2026/sqlite-wasm-3530300.zip>
